secretApiCompatibility.grantIdentity: Secret API accepts any valid integration token and requires an explicit secret grant bound to component UUID, token UUID, or token fingerprint.

oauthAccessToken.reason: Secret API does not issue or require short-lived OAuth access tokens for resolve

scopeAudienceLifecycleEvaluation.replacementGate: credential authenticity plus explicit secret grant

storage.encryption: AES-256-GCM envelope with HKDF-SHA-256 key derivation from CONFIG_VAULT_MASTER_KEY_BASE64

semanticRules.description: idempotency key and if match required
